channel.title: Technology on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Technology on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Exponential Curve: Understanding Human Advancement Acceleration
item.description: Why human advancement is accelerating exponentially - from steam engines to AGI in three centuries

item.title: Favourite Museums
item.description: Personal list of favourite museums, particularly focused on computing, technology and natural history.

item.title: General Links
item.description: Curated collection of technology, podcast, and personal blog links covering tech, science, and cultural topics.
